commit_scope: Move the fourth-arm nested do-let effect-once floor across fkwu without disturbing pure recursive/local lowering.

commands: coord claim "fourth-let-effect-once: close remaining effect-once residual after eq/lt single-walk; avoid witness, TypeScript http_get, and BML/Hati lanes"
cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh let-effect-once eq-effect-once do-effect-seq hostio-roundtrip record
local_validation.notes: Focused validation returned 111 with `fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way` and `1 ok, 0 divergent`. The host/effect/record manifest gate returned PASS-4WAY for let-effect-once, eq-effect-once, do-effect-seq, hostio-roundtrip, and record. Full validation returned `fourth arm: 208 band(s) four-way` and `611 ok, 0 divergent`.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed when this evidence was written; CI had not run yet.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested for this Form lowering/fourth-arm floor slice.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A nested do-let whose value touches a host/effect carrier is evaluated once by the emitted fourth-arm walker and later references load the same observed value, matching Go/Rust/TypeScript semantics.

phase_gate.gate: Side-effecting nested do-let bindings must walk once and be readable many times before host carrier families build on fkwu effect discipline.
phase_gate.next: Admit the next carrier op family, such as write_file_text/file_mtime/scan_run, with focused fourth-arm bands and full-suite proof.

commands.summary: let-effect-once returned 111 with `fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way` and `1 ok, 0 divergent`.

commands.command: cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh let-effect-once eq-effect-once do-effect-seq hostio-roundtrip record
commands.summary: PASS-4WAY for let-effect-once, eq-effect-once, do-effect-seq, hostio-roundtrip, and record.
Full Form sibling suite returned `fourth arm: 208 band(s) four-way` and `611 ok, 0 divergent`.

negative_probe.summary: A broad intermediate attempt that stored every nested do-let caused 64 divergences by making pure recursive/local bindings contend on global fkwu RAM slots. The shipped fix stores only effecting carrier values plus record_new, leaving pure inline lowering intact.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: 205 four-way bands / 605 ok / 0 divergent after eq/lt single-walk on main

north_star_alignment.current_floor: Nested do-let bindings whose value is an effecting carrier op now lower through fk-store/fk-load, so the value walks once and later reads load the same observed result.
north_star_alignment.connected_tissue: The fourth-arm manifest, agent start packet, BML native north-star cell, commit evidence, and native proof-ledger record all name the same let-effect-once floor.
north_star_alignment.remaining_gap: write_file_text/file_mtime/scan_run and segmented-FILE/Postgres carriers can build on effect-once let discipline, but unsupported op rows still need their own fourth-arm carrier admission before they enter the manifest.
